mapper.select: SELECT a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_CN, b.FILE_MEMO, b.FILE_SN, b.FILE_STRE_COURS, b.STRE_FILE_NM, b.FILE_EXTSN, b.ORIGNL_FILE_NM, b.FILE_SIZE, a.CREAT_DT, b.FILE_ORDR FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D' ORDER BY b.FILE_SN

SELECT a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_CN, b.FILE_MEMO, b.FILE_SN, b.FILE_STRE_COURS, b.STRE_FILE_NM, b.FILE_EXTSN, b.ORIGNL_FILE_NM, b.FILE_SIZE, a.CREAT_DT, b.FILE_ORDR FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D' ORDER BY b.FILE_ORDR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_TB (ATCH_FILE_ID, CREAT_DT, USE_AT) VALUES ( #{atchFileId}, SYSDATE(), 'Y')

INSERT INTO FILE_DETAIL_TB ( ATCH_FILE_ID, FILE_SN, FILE_STRE_COURS, STRE_FILE_NM, ORIGNL_FILE_NM, FILE_EXTSN, FILE_SIZE, FILE_CN, FILE_MEMO, FILE_ORDR, UPLOAD_SRC, CREAT_ID, CREAT_DT ) VALUES ( #{atchFileId}, #{fileSn}, #{fileStreCours}, #{streFileNm}, #{orignlFileNm}, #{fileExtsn}, #{fileMg}, #{fileCn}, #{fileMemo}, #{fileOrdr}, #{uploadSrc}, #{creatId}, SYSDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE FILE_DETAIL_TB SET STRE_FILE_NM = CONCAT( #{newDavPath}, SUBSTRING(STRE_FILE_NM, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldDavPath}) + 1) ) , UPLOAD_SRC = 'A' , STATE = 'U' WHERE STRE_FILE_NM LIKE CONCAT(#{oldDavPath}, '/%')
mapper.select: SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID, FILE_CN, FILE_SN, FILE_STRE_COURS, STRE_FILE_NM, FILE_EXTSN, ORIGNL_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE FROM FILE_DETAIL_TB WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND FILE_SN = #{fileSn}

SELECT a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_CN, b.FILE_MEMO, b.FILE_SN, b.FILE_STRE_COURS, b.STRE_FILE_NM, b.FILE_EXTSN, b.ORIGNL_FILE_NM, b.FILE_SIZE, a.CREAT_DT FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D'
ORDER BY a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_SN LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(a.ATCH_FILE_ID) FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D'

SELECT a.ATCH_FILE_ID, b.FILE_CN, b.FILE_MEMO, b.FILE_SN, b.FILE_STRE_COURS, b.STRE_FILE_NM, b.FILE_EXTSN, b.ORIGNL_FILE_NM, b.FILE_SIZE, a.CREAT_DT, b.FILE_ORDR FROM FILE_TB a, FILE_DETAIL_TB b WHERE a.ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND a.ATCH_FILE_ID = b.ATCH_FILE_ID AND UPPER(b.FILE_EXTSN) IN ('GIF','JPG','JPEG','BMP','PNG') AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND b.STATE != 'D' ORDER BY b.FILE_SN

SELECT FILE_STRE_COURS, STRE_FILE_NM, UPLOAD_SRC FROM FILE_DETAIL_TB WHERE STRE_FILE_NM IN
#{nm}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FOLDER_META_TB (FOLDER_PATH, PATH_HASH, CREAT_ID, UPLOAD_SRC) VALUES (#{vo.folderPath}, #{vo.pathHash}, #{vo.creatId}, #{vo.uploadSrc})
mapper.update: UPDATE FOLDER_META_TB SET FOLDER_PATH = CONCAT(#{vo.folderPath}, SUBSTRING(FOLDER_PATH, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldPrefix}) + 1)) , PATH_HASH = SHA2(CONCAT(#{vo.folderPath}, SUBSTRING(FOLDER_PATH, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldPrefix}) + 1)), 256) , UPDATE_ID = #{vo.creatId} , UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#{oldPrefix}, '/%')
mapper.select:
SELECT FOLDER_PATH AS folderPath, UPLOAD_SRC AS uploadSrc FROM FOLDER_META_TB WHERE FOLDER_PATH IN
#{p}
